meaning: adj.沙的,含沙的,沙质 Sandy 桑迪(男子名)
examples: The sandy beach was in sight.
He checked the sandy areas of the arroyo for any tracks.
Sandy leaned across the table, his face uncomfortably close to Brad's.
Ardman is 5 foot 11, weighs 167 pounds and has blue eyes and sandy-colored hair.
The charity has responded to disasters in Louisiana, Oklahoma, Haiti and areas affected by Superstorm Sandy.
